subcodes.first_line: The Book, revealed from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, verily summoneth all unto God, the Lord of the Unseen and the Seen. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب معلوم من الله المهیمن القیوم انه یدع الکل الی الله رب الغیب و الشهود قل
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @idolatry, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
